_note: Service + Route + netpol/egress. Routes RBAC + NetworkPolicy + app ingress are lifted from the workshop's session.objects by deploy_workshop (authored_session_extras). verify-egress-blocked is expect_fail on CRC (CRC has internet egress; real air-gapped DCS blocks it).

steps.run: envsubst < deployment.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc patch deployment/hello-dcs --type=json -p '[{"op":"add","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/imagePullPolicy","value":"Always"}]' && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=150s
